# Hypersonic

> Lightning-fast tracker for calories, exercise, weight, bills, and bank accounts in one private dashboard.

Hypersonic is a personal health and finance tracking app. After signing in, users can log food intake and calories, exercise sessions, weight measurements, recurring bills and subscriptions, and bank/credit-card balances. All data is private to the authenticated user.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the app and entry point to sign in.
